SkyLab.hintNarrow: Sky Lab is on. Tap the sky to draw stars. Close it from the corner button when done.
SkyLab.hintTouch: Open Sky Lab in the top-left corner, then tap the sky to draw stars and open the nav chart.
SkyLab.hintDesktop: Open Sky Lab in the top-left corner first, then click the sky to draw constellations.
SkyLab.manualFxOff: Site FX off · enable Site FX to draw

SiteFx.descFull: Cosmic sky, backgrounds, and full Sky Lab VFX (constellations, planets, crazy mode).
SiteFx.descReduced: Lite backgrounds and lite Sky Lab — constellations only; no planets or crazy mode.
SiteFx.descOff: All site visual effects off. Sky Lab nav chart works; sky drawing and VFX are off.
